PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick McNeil for (petitioner) Marcia Nelson.

The Court stated that this is for probate of a lost will, that we have a copy but no original and that there is a need for evidence to overcome the presumption of revocation. Mr. McNeil stated that he has no additional evidence. The Court stated that there is evidence that the pour over will was part of the set of testamentary documents, that it does not make sense to draw inference that this will would be destroyed and asked if Ms. Brasso has originals of the other documents. Mr. McNeil confirmed that she has the originals and that the assets are in excess of $7,000,000.00. The Court stated that the evidence is bolstered by the daughter's testimony and granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Woodford Rowland specially appearing for Patrick McNeil for (petitioner) Marcia Nelson.

The Court stated that it has been given nothing to overcome the presumption of revocation. Mr. Rowland stated that the issue was not made clear until Friday and that he can explain. The Court stated that it will need it in writing and that it will continue the hearing for the evidence to be submitted. The petition for probate of lost will and for letters testamentary was continued to October 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The submission of evidence needs to be filed no later than October 22, 2015 for review.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
